testcase.name: runScenario["Google Search Test with multiple data", "Google Search Functionality"](1)

failure.message: expected [Samsung phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Samsung+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=5B-pacnfJJmwwcsPmPWY8Aw&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaakt9AYfDdqjI5_DdP3ULcY6PiCBV80J&ved=0ahUKEwjJ4ZeXjoiTAxUZWHADHZg6Bs4Q4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Samsung+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5TYW1zdW5nIHBob25lc0ggUABYHnAAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=5R-paZzZMOShnesP9LGJ6Q0&safe=active]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Samsung phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Samsung+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=5B-pacnfJJmwwcsPmPWY8Aw&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaakt9AYfDdqjI5_DdP3ULcY6PiCBV80J&ved=0ahUKEwjJ4ZeXjoiTAxUZWHADHZg6Bs4Q4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Samsung+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5TYW1zdW5nIHBob25lc0ggUABYHnAAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=5R-paZzZMOShnesP9LGJ6Q0&safe=active] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at stepDefinitions.GoogleSearch_stepDef.user_can_successfully_see_the_product_iphone_phones_google_search(GoogleSearch_stepDef.java:40) at ✽.user can successfully see the product "Samsung phones - Google Search"(file:///C:/Users/dsenthi1/eclipse-workspace/Cucumber_BDD/src/test/resources/features/Google_Search.feature:8)
testcase.system-out: @Smoke Scenario Outline: Google Search Test with multiple data # src/test/resources/features/Google_Search.feature:12 Given user can able to navigates into google website # stepDefinitions.GoogleSearch_stepDef.user_can_able_to_navigates_into_google_website() When user enters the "Samsung phones" details in the search box # stepDefinitions.GoogleSearch_stepDef.user_enters_the_product_details_in_the_search_box(java.lang.String) Then user can successfully see the product "Samsung phones - Google Search" # stepDefinitions.GoogleSearch_stepDef.user_can_successfully_see_the_product_iphone_phones_google_search(java.lang.String) java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Samsung phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Samsung+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=5B-pacnfJJmwwcsPmPWY8Aw&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaakt9AYfDdqjI5_DdP3ULcY6PiCBV80J&ved=0ahUKEwjJ4ZeXjoiTAxUZWHADHZg6Bs4Q4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Samsung+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5TYW1zdW5nIHBob25lc0ggUABYHnAAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=5R-paZzZMOShnesP9LGJ6Q0&safe=active] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at stepDefinitions.GoogleSearch_stepDef.user_can_successfully_see_the_product_iphone_phones_google_search(GoogleSearch_stepDef.java:40) at ✽.user can successfully see the product "Samsung phones - Google Search"(file:///C:/Users/dsenthi1/eclipse-workspace/Cucumber_BDD/src/test/resources/features/Google_Search.feature:8)

SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Mar 05, 2026 11:47:10 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 Mar 05, 2026 11:47:10 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.76. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Google Search Test with multiple data", "Google Search Functionality"](2)

failure.message: expected [Iphone phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Iphone+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=6R-padP_G7ztseMP07HKgQI&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaakt-TSlL0YUrzkGnoytjbgN-EW_R0G-&ved=0ahUKEwiTmMCZjoiTAxW8dmwGHdOYMiAQ4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Iphone+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig1JcGhvbmUgcGhvbmVzSB9QAFgdcAB4AJABAJgBAKABAKoBALgBA8gBAPgBAZgCAKACAJgDAJIHAKAHALIHALgHAMIHAMgHAIAIAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=6h-paZnPMfbsseMPgdqjmA0&safe=active]

testcase.name: runScenario["Google Search Test with multiple data", "Google Search Functionality"](3)

failure.message: expected [Oneplus phones - Google Search] but found [Google Search]
